creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun Jun  9 16:57:14 2013
New Revision: 320351
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/320351

Log:
  - Update to 2.0
  
  PR:		179221
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Deleted:
  head/misc/gctpc/files/patch-ac
  head/misc/gctpc/files/patch-ad
Modified:
  head/misc/gctpc/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/misc/gctpc/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/misc/gctpc/files/patch-aa   (contents, props changed)
  head/misc/gctpc/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/misc/gctpc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/gctpc/Makefile	Sun Jun  9 16:56:01 2013	(r320350)
+++ head/misc/gctpc/Makefile	Sun Jun  9 16:57:14 2013	(r320351)
@@ -2,21 +2,23 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	gctpc
-PORTVERSION=	1.3
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	2.0
 CATEGORIES=	misc geography
 MASTER_SITES=	http://edcftp.cr.usgs.gov/pub/software/gctpc/
-DISTNAME=	gctpc
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION:S/.//g}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar.Z
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	USGS General Cartographic Transformation Package (GCTP)
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}/source
+
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 ALL_TARGET=	libgctpc.so.1
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
-CFLAGS+=	-Wno-error=return-type
+MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 

Modified: head/misc/gctpc/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/gctpc/distinfo	Sun Jun  9 16:56:01 2013	(r320350)
+++ head/misc/gctpc/distinfo	Sun Jun  9 16:57:14 2013	(r320351)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (gctpc.tar.Z) = 714d20893ab9b901ffa92e0b181b4ab8a92d025fecc6cbf5b5fa02c4e7c07e1e
-SIZE (gctpc.tar.Z) = 11090665
+SHA256 (gctpc20.tar.Z) = 217eae42f580175a04bae11b87afc59fde4f770aeccc16c90ef9f826a94fa66b
+SIZE (gctpc20.tar.Z) = 10381911

==============================================================================

+++ head/misc/gctpc/files/patch-aa	Sun Jun  9 16:57:14 2013	(r320351)
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ $FreeBSD$
  
  OBJECTS=		\
  		$(ARCHIVE)(alberfor.o) $(ARCHIVE)(alberinv.o) \
-@@ -56,8 +58,13 @@
+@@ -56,6 +58,11 @@
  	  cproj.c report.c lamccfor.c lamccinv.c paksz.c untfz.c sphdz.c \
  	  br_gctp.c Makefile cproj.h proj.h
  
@@ -28,8 +28,5 @@ $FreeBSD$
 +	rm -rf objs
 +
  $(ARCHIVE):	$(OBJECTS)
--		ranlib geolib.a
-+		ranlib libgctpc.a
  
  
- $(ARCHIVE)(gctp.o):	 	$(INCS)

==============================================================================

+++ head/misc/gctpc/pkg-plist	Sun Jun  9 16:57:14 2013	(r320351)

 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/appendixB.txt
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/appendixC.txt
